name: MUTTI-PARMA.COM
message: [AI generated] MUTTI-PARMA.COM is the website for Mutti, a leading company in the production of paste-based tomatoes. Located in Parma, Italy, it has been family-run for over 100 years. The company is committed to sustainable farming, and its products are globally recognized for their superior quality. They offer a range of products like whole peel tomatoes, sauces, pasta and pastes.
